title: Zapier MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Zapier MCP Server for Claude

Connect to nearly 8,000 apps through Zapier's automation platform

- **Category:** mcp
- **Author:** Zapier
- **Brand:** Zapier / zapier.com
- **Download trust:** first-party
- **Tags:** `automation` `zapier` `integration` `workflow` `no-code`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http zapier YOUR_GENERATED_URL && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "zapier": {
    "url": "https://mcp.zapier.com/YOUR_GENERATED_URL",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add --transport http zapier YOUR_GENERATED_URL && claude mcp list
